name: 72"x14" Table Runner Khaki/Black Striped - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your dining setup with the textured style of this Striped Table Runner from Threshold™. This rectangular table runner features a black striped pattern on a khaki backdrop for a timeless look. The 100% cotton table runner helps protect your surface against scratches, spills and messes. Pair it with coordinating napkins and placemats to create a stylish and cohesive tablescape.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
